title: Earnings call transcript: Marathon Digital Q4 2024 beats EPS forecasts
text: Marathon Digital Holdings reported strong Q4 2024 performance, significantly surpassing earnings expectations with earnings per share (EPS) of $1.24 against a forecast of -$0.16. Revenue reached $214.4 million, exceeding the anticipated $180.74 million. Following the earnings announcement, Marathon Digital's stock price increased by 7.63% in after-hours trading reaching $13.40. On the day of the news announcement, MARA gained 5.46%, reflecting a notable positive market reaction. The market response demonstrates investor confidence in the company's operational execution and strategic positioning for 2025.
